value.rationale: This is a private personal journal entry written by a teenager (Maya, ~14 years old) expressing significant emotional distress — social comparison, withdrawal, and concealment of her struggles — which does not map to any standard family logistics event type, and requires sensitive human judgment rather than any automated action.

payload.author: Maya
payload.summary: Private journal entry expressing emotional distress: social comparison, difficulty getting out of bed, and deliberate concealment of struggles from others.
